_comment: KMail Phase 4 — Stalwart v0.16.0 multi-node HA template. One file per shard, with per-node identity and the shared multi-tenant infrastructure pinned identically across the cluster. See deploy/stalwart/README.md for operator guidance.

data.comment: Shared across every shard so account/auth state is consistent.

blob.comment: Per-tenant bucket provisioned by internal/tenant/zkfabric.go. Production automation rewrites this entry per shard per tenant during the BFF CreateTenant lifecycle hook.

queue.comment: Pin tenants to the same outbound pool every send so warmup credit accumulates on a single PTR. Never share an outbound IP across unrelated pools.

auth.comment: The KMail BFF's JMAP proxy injects X-KMail-Stalwart-Account-Id over a trusted network. Phase 5 swaps this for the signed internal-OIDC token in docs/JMAP-CONTRACT.md §3.2.
